info.name: Snowflake Iceberg Table API
info.description:
The Snowflake Iceberg Table API is a REST API that you can use to access, update, and perform certain actions on Iceberg Table resource in a Snowflake database.

Contact Support:
 Name: Snowflake, Inc.
 Email: support@snowflake.com

item.name: Resume Recluster of an Iceberg Table

request.description: Resume recluster of an iceberg table (iceberg tables managed by an external catalog do not allow clustering)

item.name: Suspend Recluster of an Iceberg Table

request.description: Suspend recluster of an iceberg table (iceberg tables managed by an external catalog do not allow clustering)

item.name: Refreshes the Metadata for an Apache Iceberg Table That Uses an External Iceberg Catalog

request.description: Refreshes the metadata for an Apache Iceberg table that uses an external Iceberg catalog

item.name: Converts an Apache Iceberg™ Table That Uses an External Iceberg Catalog Into a Table That Uses Snowflake as the Catalog

request.description: Convert unmanaged iceberg table to managed iceberg table

item.name: Clone a Snowflake Managed Iceberg Table

url.raw: {{baseUrl}}/api/v2/databases/:database/schemas/:schema/iceberg-tables/{{name}}:clone?value=reference ./common.yaml%23/components/schemas/Identifier not found in the OpenAPI spec&value=reference ./common.yaml%23/components/schemas/Identifier not found in the OpenAPI spec

query.description: Database of the newly created table. Defaults to the source table's database.
query.value: reference ./common.yaml#/components/schemas/Identifier not found in the OpenAPI spec

query.description: Schema of the newly created table. Defaults to the source table's schema.
query.value: reference ./common.yaml#/components/schemas/Identifier not found in the OpenAPI spec
